import React from 'react'; import { X, LogOut, Shield, User, Mail, Award } from 'lucide-react'; function UserProfile({ user, onClose, onLogout }) { if (!user) return null; return (
{/* 🌑 Backdrop (Click to close) */}
{/* 🎨 Profile Side Panel */}
{/* Header Glow */}

My Identity

{/* Avatar Section */}
{user.name?.charAt(0) || 'U'}

{user.name}

{user.role}
{/* Details List */}

Username / Roll No

{user.username}

Access Level

{user.role || 'Standard'}

{/* Footer Actions */}
); } export default UserProfile;
